items.title: Salesforce: Strong Performance, Why I Am Buying More

items.title: Novartis Selects ​Salesforce’s (CRM) Agentforce Life Sciences for Customer Engagement
items.description: ​Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the Best Quality Stocks to Buy Before 2026. On December 17, Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) announced that Novartis (NYSE:NVS) has selected the company’s Agentforce Life Sciences for Customer Engagement to connect patients and Healthcare professional experiences. ​Novartis has already invested in the company through Agentforce Health, 360 for Health & […]
